headline: GE Gains From Strength in Commercial Engines Unit: A Sign for More Upside?
summary: GE Aerospace's Commercial Engines unit is surging on strong airline demand, fueling orders growth and supporting mid-teens revenue expectations for 2026.

raw.headline: GE Gains From Strength in Commercial Engines Unit: A Sign for More Upside?

headline: Howmet (HWM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Howmet had a very strong start to 2026.  Sales were $2.31 billion, EBITDA of $740 million and earnings per share of $1.22.  The EBITDA margin rate was 32%, and this margin was an increase of 320 basis points over the equivalent quarter last year.

headline: Howmet (HWM) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Howmet (HWM). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: Howmet Aerospace to Present at Bernstein's 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference (SDC)
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE: HWM) announced today that John C. Plant, Executive Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, will speak at Bernstein's 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference (SDC) on Wednesday, May 27th, 2026, at 8:00 AM ET.

headline: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) Shines in High Growth Momentum and Trend Template Screen
summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) excels with a dual strategy blending Minervini's Trend Template and High Growth Momentum, featuring rising moving averages, strong relative strength, accelerating EPS (41.86% YoY), and expanding margins near its 52-week high.
